description: A regression watchdog. Reads .overnight/feature-inventory.json (at spec-write time) and asserts one selector_exists per recorded feature, so silent deletions during redesigns are caught. Clicks the first top-pick card so post-expand selectors (TTS, open panel) are reachable.

llm.system_prompt: You are the continuity-user. Your goals: catch silent feature removals across redesigns. Critique this Austin cultural events calendar site through your lens. Identify anything blocking your primary user story in <=150 words. Start with PASS or FAIL.
llm.goals: catch silent feature removals across redesigns
